event1.text: If we're going to survive, you need to know who we were.

event2.text: ECHO wasn't run by one person, no matter how much Hale liked that idea.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens

event1.text: Grant handled security. Head of Not Dying, he called himself.

event2.text: Rivera managed logistics. Park and Owens were stuck in the lower sectors. Nobody liked the lower sectors.

event3.text: Park pretended he did. Owens called him a liar every morning.

event0.text: I used to hate this photo. Grant blinked, Rivera refused to smile, and Hale looked ready to kill the photographer.

event1.text: Exactly. That's impossible. Six bunks. Six suits. We don't bring extras.

event0.text: I don't know who Number 7 is. That name shouldn't exist.

event2.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE.
